rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts has no relation to Elec. Code §253.1611, which governs political contribution limits for judicial candidates and officeholders.
quote: Sec. 253.1611. CERTAIN CONTRIBUTIONS BY JUDICIAL CANDIDATES, OFFICEHOLDERS, AND COMMITTEES RESTRICTED.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and judicial campaign finance restrictions.
